title: WoW Mythic+ Dashboard - Stats, Spec Popularity & Dungeon Trends for MN Season 1 | MythiStone
content: Pages Dashboard Search site close No results. View all results settings announcement Mythistone is now available in the Game! Check out the Addon on CurseForge. View Addon close Dashboard Overall Mythic+ Statistics for MN Season 1. Shortest Run +++2 Skyreach US sprint Cleared in 08:10.044 Run happened: Longest Run -15 Skyreach KR hourglass_bottom Cleared in 04:38:22.483 Run happened: Highest Run +20 Skyreach US leaderboard Cleared in 27:25.686 Run happened: Spec Popularity Overall Spec Popularity by Keylevel Spec popularity Across all Keylevels schedule Last Update: Spec popularity By Keylevel schedule Last Update: Keys per Week schedule Last Update: Most Popular Dungeons schedule Last Update: Spec Popularity vs Performance schedule Last Update: See How It’s Calculated Dungeon Popularity across Keylevels schedule Last Update: How Performance Is Calculated We look at every run of a given specialization and assign: Positive points when the key upgrades (higher-level keys earn more points). Negative points when the key depletes (losing a low-level key is judged more harshly). Then we average those points across all runs to get a single “Performance” number. Why This Matters Rewards high-level pushes more strongly. Punishes depletes in a balanced way. Gives a fair comparison regardless of how many runs each spec has. Summary This chart helps you spot specializations that are both strong in pushing keys (high performance) and popular among players (many runs).
